stories.title: Cavs close out Raptors in 7 behind Allen's 22-19
stories.summary: Jarrett Allen tied his playoff career high with 22 points and grabbed 19 rebounds as the Cavaliers advanced to the Eastern Conference semifinals with a 114-102 victory over the Raptors in Game 7 of their series Sunday night.

stories.title: Pistons cap comeback with Game 7 rout of Magic
stories.summary: The top-seeded Pistons routed the Magic in Sunday's Game 7 to complete a comeback from a 3-1 series deficit and win a playoff series for the first time in 18 years.

stories.title: Banchero unsure of Magic's makeup after collapse
stories.summary: Orlando star forward Paolo Banchero, after the Magic lost Game 7 to the Detroit Pistons on Sunday, seemed unsure of his club's prospects in a talented Eastern Conference, saying, "I can't say we're good enough to be in the Finals or the Eastern finals."

stories.title: Canadiens win Game 7 with just nine shots on net
stories.summary: Alex Newhook and Nick Suzuki scored goals, and the Montreal Canadiens, despite posting just nine shots on net, defeated the favored Lightning 2-1 in Game 7 of the Eastern Conference quarterfinals Sunday night, a fourth straight Round 1 exit for Tampa Bay.

stories.title: Yankees option Volpe after rehab window closes
stories.summary: The Yankees optioned Anthony Volpe to Triple-A after the shortstop returned from his minor league rehab assignment.
